import socket, struct, time

assert result == 0, f'Security failed: {result}'

sock.send(bytes([1]))  # shared flag

data = b''

height = struct.unpack('>H', data[2:4])[0]
bpp = data[4]
print(f'Server: {width}x{height} bpp={bpp}')

name_len = struct.unpack('>I', data[20:24])[0]
sock.recv(name_len)

# Don't change pixel format, use server default
# Just request framebuffer update - non-incremental
req = struct.pack('>BxHHHH', 0, 0, 0, width, height)
sock.send(req)
print('Sent framebuffer request, waiting...')

# Read all available data
fb_data = b''

while time.time() - start < 8:
    try:

            break
        fb_data += chunk
    except socket.timeout:
        break

print(f'Got {len(fb_data)} bytes')
sock.close()

if len(fb_data) > 3:
    msg_type = fb_data[0]
    print(f'Message type: {msg_type}')

            rx, ry, rw, rh, enc = struct.unpack('>HHHHI', fb_data[off:off+12])
            off += 12
            print(f'  Rect {i}: ({rx},{ry}) {rw}x{rh} enc={enc}')
            
            if enc == 0:  # Raw
                pixsz = bpp // 8
                pixbytes = rw * rh * pixsz
                print(f'  Raw pixels: {pixbytes} bytes')
                if off + pixbytes <= len(fb_data):
                    with open('/tmp/vnc-raw.bin', 'wb') as f:
                        f.write(fb_data[off:off+pixbytes])
                    # Convert to PPM
                    header = f'P6\n{rw} {rh}\n255\n'.encode()

                        else:

                    print(f'Saved PPM: {rw}x{rh}')
                off += pixbytes
